name: Spring Boot 3
description: Spring Boot 3.x default pattern: ISO-8601 timestamp with offset, right-padded level, pid, --- [thread] logger : message. The offset is captured as <zone> rather than read by timestamp_format, which cannot accept both 'Z' and '+08:00'. Stack traces fold into the line above.
